immediate_actions.step: Inject EpiPen into outer thigh immediately (can go through clothing)
Call 911 — required even if EpiPen was used
immediate_actions.note: Biphasic reactions occur in up to 20% of cases

immediate_actions.step: Lay flat with legs elevated, or sit if easier to breathe
immediate_actions.note: Never allow standing — risk of cardiovascular collapse

immediate_actions.step: Remove stinger or exposure trigger if possible
immediate_actions.note: Scrape bee stinger sideways — do not squeeze

next_steps.step: Second EpiPen in opposite thigh if no improvement in 5-15 minutes
Begin CPR if person stops breathing
